return(function(...)local h={"\121\088\054\047\084\050\061\061";"\103\100\108\053\080\079\108\053\043\098\083\122\043\116\099\097","\051\073\108\073\070\122\111\110\121\105\099\119\104\106\071\074\070\120\103\111\087\074\052\122\075\068\084\088\043\070\057\107\043\050\061\061";"\090\109\083\053\103\118\121\097\121\114\061\061";"\053\057\053\078","\076\111\097\084\056\108\121\085\043\113\067\047\108\047\097\053\043\052\086\061","\073\100\050\061";"\090\101\097\100\080\088\111\112\119\115\068\055\090\098\056\100\076\098\118\061","\067\088\121\107\101\088\089\118\067\088\054\086\083\110\054\078\068\052\076\061";"\103\088\067\122\080\088\050\061";"\105\117\065\116\069\077\109\103\100\079\117\061";"\100\054\071\121\086\108\052\061";"\043\079\055\066\121\111\065\043\076\113\069\052\080\116\068\109\048\056\061\061","\106\106\077\071\112\047\104\061";"\049\109\122\066\071\053\120\069\051\114\061\061";"\101\119\111\047\074\054\111\043","\084\118\055\076\101\107\086\055\108\088\055\047\103\116\111\083";"\066\116\074\056\081\098\104\116\111\056\061\061","\084\069\077\089\102\071\087\118\089\066\076\110\069\067\056\113";"\098\111\105\057\068\079\104\061";"";"\111\120\106\053\069\047\053\061","\080\079\054\069\080\117\061\061","\109\056\076\047\048\122\051\047\073\078\122\050\112\111\089\082\097\079\082\057\050\051\086\115\097\105\098\071\113\112\100\111\106\057\065\070\088\084\104\067\117\081\051\061","\119\051\055\098\084\053\097\070\051\107\083\066\121\051\121\050\056\111\076\061","\048\116\108\098\051\109\083\097\084\118\054\122\051\107\089\101";"\050\103\052\070\055\051\068\068\110\050\061\061";"\122\056\048\122\107\101\073\049","\083\111\043\104\051\118\122\099\067\100\089\112\076\088\081\050\068\116\053\061","\043\113\097\053\068\056\061\061","\098\111\105\066\068\098\083\122\121\088\054\073\080\088\051\061","\056\089\085\086\082\085\049\075","\068\116\097\057\068\056\061\061","\072\086\073\075\078\050\061\061","\089\105\098\069\106\071\072\107\056\114\061\061";"\043\081\104\087\084\109\054\071\08 return(function(h,r,e,q,L,K,n,Q,J,O,g,w,p,x,k,l,C,R,W,y,H,a,N,X)N,W,R,w,k,H,p,O,Q,X,l,x,a,y,J,C,g=function(h,j)local r=k(j)local e=function(e,q,L,K,n)return x(h,{e,q;L,K,n},j,r)end return e end,{},{},function(h,j)local r=k(j)local e=function(e,q,L,K,n,W,R)return x(h,{e;q;L,K;n,W;R},j,r)end return e end,function(h)for j=-290619+290620,#h,-853+854 do R[h[j]]=(416228-416227)+R[h[j]]end if e else return q({},{[j(714194+(-1622073-(-872622)))]=p,[j(-990640-(-955486))]=h,[j(-655354-(-620118))]=function()return-946942+4947429 end})end end,function(h,j)local r=k(j)local e=function(e)return x(h,{e},j,r)end return e end,function(h)local j,x=-141045-(-141046),h[-808810+(-135406-(-944217))]while x do R[x],j=R[x]-(-179533-(-179534)),j+(1029707-1029706)if 376064+-376064==R[x]then e end,function(h,j)local r=k(j)local e=function(e,q,L,K,n,W)return x(h,{e;q;L,K;n;W},j,r)end return e end,function(h,j)local r=k(j)local e=function(e,q)return x(h,{e,q},j,r)end return e end,function(x,e,q,L)local Oi,Ni,Xi,bi,Ai,k,b,u,mi,hi,qi,s,D,wi,Ci,ei,F,v,P,Zi,S,Bi,Hi,U,o,Ki,Z,z,ti,Li,C,oi,yi,V,di,li,vi,G,ji,m,ki,Fi,t,Qi,Ri,M,T,i,Gi,n,Di,ai,I,ri,Y,Ii,R,d,Ji,ni,p,pi,f,B,ii,c,E,Wi,zi,A,xi,gi while x do if x<-548889+9924256 then if x<4538405-(-792493)then if x<-460459+2600450 then if x<1742483-650352 then if x<(617042+-386207)+49859 then if x<1265110-1030028 then if x<598106+-392681 then if
